focus: Unified visualization API layer - daemon now fetches from HTTP endpoint instead of polling JSON directly
context: Added viz API client mode to state_daemon.py. Daemon can now operate in --use-api mode or fall back to direct polling. Graceful degradation ensures continuity when API unavailable.

viz_server.py argument parsing fixed for --sim and --port flags
